label: target_plural_agreement
definition: The queried NP is the agreement controller and the finite verb realizes plural agreement.

label: target_singular_agreement
definition: The queried NP is the agreement controller and the finite verb realizes singular agreement.

label: target_unclear_agreement
definition: The NP is in the target frame but agreement realization cannot be confidently coded.

label: non_subject
definition: The queried string is not functioning as the subject of the finite verb being counted.

label: parse_shift_relative
definition: The apparent agreement verb belongs to a relative or other clause headed by a different controller.
example_or_note: people who earn a lot of money are...

label: non_target_head
definition: The surface query string is inside an NP headed by another noun or construction.
example_or_note: the ability to house a number of people was...

label: literal_or_non_quantificational
definition: The item is literal rather than quantificational or agreement-relevant.
example_or_note: literal piles/bunches where the target construction is absent

label: modifier_or_compound_noise
definition: A query term is functioning as a modifier or compound element, not the intended complement/head.

label: quoted_or_metalinguistic
definition: The row quotes or discusses an example rather than using it in ordinary discourse.

label: irrealis_or_subjunctive
definition: The form is not plural agreement but an irrealis/subjunctive realization relevant to the denominator only if the NP frame is target.
example_or_note: if a lot of money were...

label: nonstandard_or_error
definition: The row is a plausible production error or nonstandard use, coded separately from licensed target agreement.
example_or_note: keep separate; do not silently discard

label: duplicate_or_near_duplicate
definition: Duplicate text or repeated transcript line already counted.

label: unresolved
definition: Row requires manual review before inclusion.
